instruction: Questions 21–26: Choose TWO letters A–E. Questions 27–30: Choose A, B or C.

questions.prompt: Which TWO characteristics were shared by the subjects of Joanna's psychology study?

options.label: They had all won prizes for their music.
They had all made music recordings.
They were all under 27 years old.
They had all toured internationally.
They all played a string instrument.

questions.explanation: Đã thu âm (B) và từng biểu diễn quốc tế (D).

questions.prompt: Which TWO characteristics were shared by the subjects of Joanna's psychology study?

options.label: They had all won prizes for their music.

questions.explanation: Đã thu âm (B) và từng biểu diễn quốc tế (D). (cặp 21–22)

questions.prompt: Which TWO points does Joanna make about her use of telephone interviews?

options.label: It meant rich data could be collected.
It allowed the involvement of top performers.
It led to a stressful atmosphere at times.
It meant interview times had to be limited.
It caused some technical problems.

questions.explanation: Dữ liệu phong phú (A) và căng thẳng (C).

questions.prompt: Which TWO topics did Joanna originally intend to investigate?

options.label: regulations concerning concert dress
audience reactions to the dress of performers
changes in performer attitudes to concert dress
how choice of dress relates to performer roles
links between musical instrument and dress choice

questions.explanation: Quy định trang phục (A) và nhạc cụ–trang phục (E).

options.label: regulations concerning concert dress

questions.prompt: Joanna concentrated on women performers because

options.label: women are more influenced by fashion
women's dress has led to more controversy
women's code of dress is less strict than men's

questions.sectionInstruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.prompt: Mike Frost's article suggests that in popular music, women's dress is affected by

options.label: their wish to be taken seriously
their tendency to copy each other
their reaction to the masculine nature of the music

questions.prompt: What did Joanna's subjects say about the audience at a performance?

options.label: The musicians' choice of clothing is linked to respect for the audience
The clothing should not distract the audience from the music
The audience should make the effort to dress appropriately

questions.prompt: According to the speakers, musicians could learn from sports scientists about

options.label: the importance of clothing for physical freedom
the part played by clothing in improving performance
the way clothing may protect against physical injury
